title: Grilled Algerian Chicken with Spicy Gourmet Sauce
description: A flavorful and spicy dish from Algeria, served with a rich gourmet sauce. Perfect for grilled chicken lovers.
instructions: 2. Season the chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and a pinch of garlic.
3. Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
5. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
6. Add the gourmet sauce and grilled red pepper puree. Stir to combine.
7. Bring the sauce to a simmer and let cook for 2-3 minutes, until thickened.
8. Stir in the Tabasco sauce and adjust to taste.
9. Serve the grilled chicken with the spicy gourmet sauce.
10. Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
